org.docgene.model

Class XMLList

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.AbstractStyledElement
      • org.docgene.model.XMLList
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    org.docgene.model.conditions.ConditionElement<ListElement>, org.docgene.model.conditions.ConditionElementsContainer<ListElement>, ListElement, ParagraphElement, ParagraphElementParent, StyledElement

    public class XMLList
extends AbstractStyledElement
implements ListElement, org.docgene.model.conditions.ConditionElementsContainer<ListElement>, ParagraphElementParent
    Represent the content of an <ul> or <ol> tag.

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.model.StyledElement

        TYPE_NONE

      • setStartItem

        public void setStartItem(int startItem)
        Set the start item of an ordered (ol) list. This is valid only for an ol list.
        Parameters:
        startItem - the startItem

        Return the start item of an ordered (ol) list.
        Returns:
        the startItem
